meta.title: I-request so sakey a proyekto ed inkapanginawaan

hero.title: I-request so sakey a proyekto ed inkapanginawaan
hero.lead: Usisaen na IATF iray kerew parad saray proyekto ed inkapanginawaan ya manlalapud peteg a pankaukolan.
support: Agmo la kaukolan so detalyadon detalye, basta malinew labat so problema, no siopa so naapektoan, tan no akin ya importante itan.

actions.label: Usaren so Discord imbes na satan

intro: Amin a rota so onloob ed parehon panagrepaso.

items.label: Websayt
items.body: Usaren so form ed leksab pian mangiter na structured a kerew.

items.label: E-mail
items.body: I-send so kerew ya direktan onlad: {{contact.requestsEmail}}Saray kerew ed e-mail et nayarin magmaliw ya publikon rekord na kerew kayari na pan-review tan edisyon.

items.label: Agpantatalosan
items.body: Gapoan ditan no satan so sankaabigan. Say kerew so onalis ni ed parehon panagrepaso.

guidance.title: Antis mon ipawit so kerew mo
paragraphs: Say IATF et mankikimey ed publiko. Saray kerew et nayarin sumaryoen tan i-publish bilang publikon rekord na kerew diad IATAF GitHub organization, diad sayan website, odino ed parehon lugar.

Agyo ipipila iray personal ya address, numero na telepono, medical details, odino identifying information nipaakar ed saray indibidual ya manguusar na ontulong iran teknolohiya, likud labat no kaukolan itan tan labay yon na-review itan na IATF.
Ekalen na IATF iray agnakaukolan a personal a detalye na kontak antis ya ipalapag iray rekord na kerew.

review.title: Saray Iilaloan ed Panrepaso
paragraphs: Say pangiter na kerew et agmankabaliksan ya awaten la itan.
Uusisaen na IATF iray kerew parad mission fit, feasibility, usefulness, tan no kasin say kimey et walad public repository.
Arum a kerew so nayarin ag-awaten, ni-defer, odino nauman ni antis ya awaten.

fields.name: contactRoute[dumaen so pinanlapuan]
fields.label: Preferred contact route [Pinabangan ya rota na kontak]
fields.helper: Panon so nepeg ya ituloy a pan-follow-up?

fields.name: Kontak Saray Detalye
fields.label: Detalye ed pitotongtong
fields.helper: Email address odino Discord handle parad follow-up.

fields.name: lenguahe
fields.label: Lenguahe
fields.helper: Say labay mon lenguahe, no kaukolan.

fields.name: problema
fields.label: Anton problema so sasalien mon solusyonan?
fields.helper: Deskribien so babeng diad malinew iran salita.

fields.name: extraKonteksto
fields.label: Kaaruman ya konteksto
fields.helper: Manginabang na antokaman nin makatulong ed pangipaliwawa ed pankaukolan: no akin ya importante itan, saray alimbawa, reperensya, ideya ed software, odino limitasyon ed panaon.

fields.name: openSourceConsent[dumaen _ dumaen so pinanlapuan]
fields.label: Kasin komportable ka ed open-source ya panag-develop?
fields.helper: Saray naaprobaan a proyekto et publikon repository ed IATF.

header.title: No antoy labay ya ibaga na pangawat

items: sakey ya public repository ed IATF GitHub organization
sakey a responsablin inhenyero ya akaasain ed proyekto
copyleft a lisensia parad code tan project materials
sakey ya entry ed rehistro diad IATF site

header.title: Say antikey tan malinew a kerew so magenap pian onggapo

paragraphs: No talagan kaukolan moy access tan iisipen mon nepeg a magmaliw itan a publikon proyekto, ipawit mo itan ed sikami.
